recommendations.title: Cabin Fever
recommendations.overview: A group of five college graduates rent a cabin in the woods and begin to fall victim to a horrifying flesh-eating virus, which attracts the unwanted attention of the homicidal locals.

recommendations.title: Insanitarium
recommendations.overview: After he's institutionalized in order to cover for his sister, a young man encounters a doctor who is turning his patients into flesh-eating psychopaths.

recommendations.title: Dawn of the Dead
recommendations.overview: A group of survivors take refuge in a shopping mall after the world is taken over by aggressive, flesh-eating zombies.

recommendations.title: The Girl with All the Gifts
recommendations.overview: In the future, a strange fungus has changed nearly everyone into thoughtless, flesh-eating monsters. When a scientist and a teacher find a girl who seems to be immune to the fungus, they all begin a journey to save humanity.

recommendations.title: Zombeavers
recommendations.overview: College friends find their weekend of sex and debauchery ruined when deadly zombie beavers swarm their riverside cabin.

recommendations.title: Goodbye World
recommendations.overview: When a mysterious cyber-attack cripples civilization, a group of old college friends and lovers retreat to a remote country cabin, where they must cope with an uncertain future while navigating the minefield of their shared past.

recommendations.title: Tucker and Dale vs. Evil
recommendations.overview: Two hillbillies are suspected of being killers by a group of paranoid college kids camping near the duo's West Virginian cabin. As the body count climbs, so does the fear and confusion as the college kids try to seek revenge against the pair.

recommendations.title: Night of the Living Dead
recommendations.overview: A ragtag group barricade themselves in an old Pennsylvania farmhouse to remain safe from a horde of flesh-eating ghouls ravaging the Northeast.

recommendations.title: Whisper
recommendations.overview: Sinister things begin happening to kidnappers who are holding a young boy for ransom in a remote cabin.

recommendations.title: The Cabin in the Woods
recommendations.overview: Five friends set out for a weekend at a remote cabin in the woods, expecting nothing more than fun and relaxation. As night falls, they discover that something far more unsettling is at work and that nothing about their getaway is what it seems.
